ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., administrator, researcher, student) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user's role in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the data belongs to */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "data_values" REAL /* Numerical values of the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_equation" TEXT /* Mathematical equation of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear, polynomial, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the result belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for the calculation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the calculation */,
  "result_values" REAL /* Result values of the calculation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., derivative, integral, visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the visualization belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result used for the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, researcher, student) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
